user.title: Initial setup
user.description: Choose the supported forecast, set comfort temperature, and optionally pick a notification target.

data_description.outdoor_weather_entity_id: Choose the standard Home Assistant weather entity VentWise can use today. If you do not see the source you need, open a GitHub issue.
data_description.target_temperature_c: Set the indoor comfort temperature VentWise should aim for.
data_description.notification_device_id: Optional. Pick the device that should receive VentWise notifications.

outdoor.title: Outdoor overrides
outdoor.description: Optional. Leave these blank to use the forecast values.

data.outdoor_temperature_entity_id: Optional outdoor temperature sensor or helper
data.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Optional outdoor humidity sensor or helper
data.wind_speed_entity_id: Optional outdoor wind speed sensor or helper

data_description.outdoor_temperature_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast temperature. Numeric helpers are allowed too.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast humidity. Numeric helpers are allowed too.
data_description.wind_speed_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast wind speed. Numeric helpers are allowed too.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Add, edit, or remove rooms and macro-rooms for spaces whose windows affect the same air.

menu_option_descriptions.add_room: Create one room for a single space or area.
menu_option_descriptions.add_macro_room: Create one grouped area for spaces that share the same windows.
menu_option_descriptions.edit_room: Update an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.remove_room: Delete an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.finish: Skip rooms for now and save the setup.

edit_room_select.title: Edit room
edit_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to update.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

remove_room_select.title: Remove room
remove_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to delete.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

add_room.title: Add room
add_room.description: Create one room for a space with its own windows.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom or Study.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the room humidity sensor.
data_description.weight: Leave the default if you are not sure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the room logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the room logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this room.

edit_room_form.title: Edit room
edit_room_form.description: Update the selected room for a space with its own windows.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom or Study.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the room humidity sensor.
data_description.weight: Leave the default if you are not sure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the room logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the room logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this room.

add_macro_room.title: Add macro-room
add_macro_room.description: Create one grouped area for spaces that share the same windows.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this grouped area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.weight: Leave the default if you are not sure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the area logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the area logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this area.

edit_macro_room_form.title: Edit macro-room
edit_macro_room_form.description: Update the selected grouped area that shares the same windows.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this grouped area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.weight: Leave the default if you are not sure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the area logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the area logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this area.

error.invalid_input: One or more values are invalid.

init.title: Adjust VentWise
init.description: Choose what you want to edit.

menu_option_descriptions.basic: Forecast source, optional outdoor overrides, comfort temperature, quiet hours, and notifications.
menu_option_descriptions.advanced: Tuning values, supported forecast data, and entity overrides.

data.outdoor_temperature_entity_id: Optional outdoor temperature sensor or helper
data.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Optional outdoor humidity sensor or helper
data.wind_speed_entity_id: Optional outdoor wind speed sensor or helper

data_description.outdoor_weather_entity_id: Choose the standard Home Assistant weather entity VentWise can use today. If you do not see the source you need, open a GitHub issue.
data_description.outdoor_temperature_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast temperature. Numeric helpers are allowed too.
data_description.outdoor_humidity_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast humidity. Numeric helpers are allowed too.
data_description.wind_speed_entity_id: Optional. Leave blank to keep the forecast wind speed. Numeric helpers are allowed too.
data_description.target_temperature_c: Set the indoor comfort temperature VentWise should aim for.
data_description.quiet_hours_enabled: Turn on a pause while quiet hours are active.
data_description.quiet_hours_pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper or sensor that can suspend recommendations.
data_description.notification_device_id: Optional. Pick the device that should receive notifications.

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Fine-tune the technical values. Supported forecast source: a standard Home Assistant weather entity. If you want VentWise to support another forecast source, open a GitHub issue.

data_description.soft_outdoor_threshold_c: Above this temperature outside, opening windows becomes less useful.
data_description.cooldown_minutes: How long VentWise waits before sending the same suggestion again.
data_description.stability_minutes: How long a suggestion must remain unchanged before it can be sent.
data_description.quiet_hours_start_entity_id: Optional. Pick a time entity to read the quiet-hours start from.
data_description.quiet_hours_end_entity_id: Optional. Pick a time entity to read the quiet-hours end from.
data_description.master_control_entity_id: Optional. Pick the switch or helper you want to use as the master control.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Add, edit, or remove rooms and macro-rooms for spaces whose windows affect the same air.

menu_option_descriptions.add_room: Create one room for a single space or area.
menu_option_descriptions.add_macro_room: Create one grouped area for spaces that share the same windows.
menu_option_descriptions.edit_room: Update an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.remove_room: Delete an existing room or grouped area.
menu_option_descriptions.finish: Skip rooms for now and save the setup.

edit_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to update.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

remove_room_select.title: Remove room
remove_room_select.description: Choose the room you want to delete.

data_description.room_selection: Select one of the rooms already saved in VentWise.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this room, like Bedroom, Study, or Office.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the room humidity sensor.
data_description.weight: Used to balance this room against others. Keep the default if you are unsure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the room logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the room logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this room.

data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the room logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this room.

add_macro_room.title: Add macro-room
add_macro_room.description: Create a larger group that behaves like a room.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this larger area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.weight: Used to balance this grouped area against others. Keep the default if you are unsure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the area logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the area logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this area.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this grouped area, like Upstairs or Living area.
data_description.temperature_entity_id: Pick the main temperature sensor for this area.
data_description.humidity_entity_id: Optional. Pick the humidity sensor for this area.
data_description.weight: Used to balance this grouped area against others. Keep the default if you are unsure.
data_description.start_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to start the area logic.
data_description.stop_entity_id: Optional. Pick an automation or helper to stop the area logic.
data_description.pause_entity_id: Optional. Pick a helper that can suspend this area.
